mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( email, password, nickname, provider, role, status ) VALUES ( #{request.email}, #{encodedPassword}, #{request.nickname}, 'LOCAL', 'USER', 'ACTIVE' )

INSERT INTO users ( email, password, nickname, profile_image_url, provider, provider_id, role, status ) VALUES ( #{user.email}, NULL, #{nickname}, #{user.profileImageUrl}, #{user.provider}, #{user.providerId}, 'USER', 'ACTIVE' )
mapper.select: SELECT id AS userId, email, password, nickname, profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, provider, role, status FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT id AS userId, email, password, nickname, profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, provider, role, status FROM users WHERE id = #{userId}
SELECT id AS userId, email, password, nickname, profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, provider, role, status FROM users WHERE provider = #{provider} AND provider_id = #{providerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_tokens ( user_id, token, expires_at, revoked ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{token}, #{expiresAt}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, token, expires_at AS expiresAt, revoked FROM refresh_tokens WHERE token = #{token}
